name: Deco's Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: In a small bowl, combine crumbs, 3 tablespoons sugar and melted butter. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes. Cool.
2. For the filling: Drain raspberries, reserving juice. Set raspberries aside. In a small saucepan, combine reserved juice, 1/4 cup cold water and gelatin. Let stand for 5 minutes. Cook and stir over low heat until gelatin dissolves. Remove from heat. Cool for 10 minutes.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until blended. Add reserved raspberries, Grand Marnier and raspberry-gelatin mixture. Beat on low speed until well blended. Chill until partially set (mixture will be the consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Gently fold whipped cream into the partially set raspberry mixture. Spoon into the springform pan. Chill for 6 to 24 hours.
5. Run a knife around the edge of the pan to loosen. Remove the side of the pan. Top with fresh raspberries and additional whipped cream, if desired.
